post.topic: claude api error handling and retry strategies
post.hook: Stop losing requests to API errors! Master Claude API error handling 🛡️
post.caption:
Stop losing requests to API errors! Master Claude API error handling 🛡️

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: Catch Rate Limit Errors
slides.body: Handle 429 errors gracefully with exponential backoff. Never lose requests due to rate limits.

slides.title: Validate Input Before Sending
slides.body: Check message length and format before API calls. Save tokens and avoid 400 errors.

slides.title: Handle Network Timeouts
slides.body: Set reasonable timeouts and retry on connection errors. Keep your app responsive.

slides.title: Log Errors for Debugging
slides.body: Always log API errors with request details. Essential for debugging production issues.

slides.title: Want More Claude Tips?
slides.body: Follow for daily Claude API tutorials and save this post for reference!
